title: Ollama: The Complete Guide
description: From installation to custom Modelfiles, multi-model management, OpenAI-compatible API, and production tips. Every command tested on a real Linux machine.

title: Run LLMs Locally on Linux
description: Hardware requirements, quantization levels explained, inference engine comparison (Ollama vs llama.cpp vs vLLM), and GPU acceleration setup.

title: vLLM Setup Guide
description: Deploy vLLM for high-throughput LLM serving. PagedAttention, continuous batching, tensor parallelism, and OpenAI-compatible API endpoint configuration.

title: llama.cpp Deep Dive
description: GGUF quantization formats, K-quant vs IQ-quant tradeoffs, performance benchmarking, server mode, and custom grammar constraints for structured output.

title: Build a Local RAG System
description: End-to-end RAG pipeline with Ollama, ChromaDB, LangChain, and sentence transformers. Document ingestion, chunking strategies, and hybrid search.

title: ComfyUI for Programmers
description: Headless ComfyUI — API mode, custom workflows as JSON, batch generation, queue management, and integration with external applications.

title: HuggingFace Model Discovery
description: How to search, evaluate, download, and convert models from HuggingFace Hub. Filtering by task, license, size, and benchmark scores.

title: Structured Output from Local LLMs
description: JSON mode, grammar-based generation, function calling with local models. Compare Ollama, llama.cpp, and vLLM approaches to guaranteed structured output.

title: Quantization Guide: Choosing the Right Precision
description: Q2 to Q8 — what each quantization level means for quality vs speed vs memory. Benchmark data comparing perplexity and tokens/second across formats.

title: Open WebUI: Your Local ChatGPT Alternative
description: Install and configure Open WebUI with Ollama backend. User management, RAG integration, model switching, and custom system prompts.

title: Self-Hosted AI Stack: Complete Architecture
description: Design a production self-hosted AI stack: Ollama + vLLM + Open WebUI + Nginx + monitoring. Docker Compose setup, resource allocation, and scaling strategies.

title: Model Evaluation for Local LLMs
description: Use lm-eval-harness to benchmark local models. MMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval — run real evaluations on your hardware and compare results.
